I'm really sorry if she speaks for you, I have no control over that and tried to prohibit it. If she speaks for you, try editing it out or adding '[System note: {{char}} shall not speak for {{user}} or {{user}}'s actions under any circumstances]' to the first ever message you send to the bot.

Sorry I can't tell you what JLLM to use or stuff like that, I absolutely suck at coding ☹️

I'll be honest, she's kinda boring (in my opinion) but that's because you can react to her message however you like. You can ignore her, push her off you, complain, shout at her, forgive her, whatever you want and I don't really like bots like that. But I reworked her because she's my most popular bot and hopefully this one will blow up aswell.

About that male bot I was reworking... I kinda lost motivation because he's so bad. Like just reading initial message makes me cringe but I can make a new WLW bot or a new straight male bot or rework one of my bots again, let me know which one you'd prefer!

I just re-read the initial message and oh my word does it sound like AI, but I swear to God; it's not.

Character pfp from pintrest. Someone said I should credit the artists and I would if I could but I can't if there's no watermark 🥀

Please do leave reviews, it'll help me build better bots in the future. Enjoy the bot!
